Capture notification design description: Design capture notifications (with preview and actions). System alerts are brief status messages and stay fixed.
Notification types glossary: System notifications = brief status text. Capture notifications = preview and action buttons (customizable).

Every capture uses the notification you: Every capture uses the capture notification you design on the right (preview and actions). Turn on Send to Editor to open images in the editor and show the brief system alert on the left instead.
